ideation: This sequence simulates a simple yet expressive clapping motion.  It focuses on the key positions of the hands during a clap, avoiding overly detailed intermediate frames.  The robot's lack of elbows is taken into account, focusing on the shoulder joint movements to create the illusion of clapping.

frames.beat: arms raise slightly, palms facing inward
hands meet in a quick, sharp clap
arms return to a relaxed, ready position
